description: Recto: Petition, probably. In Arabic script. Fragment (lower left corner, portions of 4 lines preserved). The raʾy clause is partially legible in the last line: [wa-raʾyuhā] al-ʿālī [fī dhā]lika in shāʾa llāhu. The main text needs further examination for content. Might mention earning a living (iktisāb). Verso: The petition was torn and the back was reused for a brief account involving Maḥfūẓ (related to T-S NS 297.231?). Needs further examination.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
